mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : SchCalendarDAO.listPaging 설 명 : 수업일정 페이징 조회 */
SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(order by SYSJOB_SCHDL_SYMD, SYSJOB_SCHDL_EYMD) AS LINE_NO , ACAD_SCH_SN AS scheduleId , NVL(UNIV_CD, 'A') AS UNIV_CD , ACAD_SCH_NM AS TTL , SCH_CNTS AS content , SYSJOB_SCHDL_SYMD AS startDt , SYSJOB_SCHDL_EYMD AS endDt , COUNT(*) OVER() AS TOTAL_CNT FROM TB_HOME_ACAD_SCH WHERE SYSJOB_SCHDL_TYCD = 'course' AND USEYN = 'Y'
AND ( SUBSTR(SYSJOB_SCHDL_SYMD, 1, 4) = #{creYear} OR SUBSTR(SYSJOB_SCHDL_EYMD, 1, 4) = #{creYear} )
AND UNIV_CD <> 'G'
AND UNIV_CD <> 'C'
AND LOWER(ACAD_SCH_NM) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{searchValue}), '%')
ORDER BY SYSJOB_SCHDL_SYMD, SYSJOB_SCHDL_EYMD ) A WHERE A.LINE_NO >= #{firstIndex} AND A.LINE_NO <= #{listScale}
